title: Thermal Shock
description: A Sci-Fi Lore-Heavy Winter Dimension Mod with an emphasis on Combat
body:
**THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB AND AAA PARTICLES**

Thermal Shock is a progression and combat focused dimension mod featuring Loqendia, the Endless Garden. A once lush and thriving realm, now cursed with an eternal winter, and infested with the undead.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/eBHzKrJd4js" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# NEW: Version 06, THE **THERMO-FEBRUARY 2026** UPDATE
We're celebrating TWO YEARS of development, this update adds a cozy new Gardening system, inspired by PvZ's Zen Garden, along with numerous miscellaneous additions and improvements! :D

## Entering Loqendia
The dimension can be accessed with a Keystone, which you will be prompted to retrieve early on. Using it on a 3x3 obsidian platform will create the Atlas, granting access to Loqendia.

## New Dimension
Loqendia is a vast frozen expanse containing various new flora and fauna. Bright new wood types can be found along with a multitude of stone variants. A large roster of wildlife populate the surface, while hordes of hostiles and old constructs lurk underground.

## Ores
The main set of Thermal Shock's tools and armor is crafted with Ruby ore, ranking at around diamond tier.
Other ores feature more niche uses, or are not bound to a specific tier of equipment.

## Zenith Upgrades
Zenith Smithing Templates are used for unlocking Set Bonuses of Loqendian armor sets, granting the wearer a passive buff if they have a full matching set of Zenith armor equipped.
They can be found on occasion in most structures.

## Alternate Ore Generation
Not all worlds will generate the same set of ores. Some worlds will generate Bloodstone over Ruby, some will generate Bismuth over Malachite.
_Alternative ores can be converted into their counterparts and vice versa. All ores are obtainable through structure loot, too._

## Fabricator
A special crafting station which uses an unconventional system. Instead of requiring a specific shape on a grid, Fabricator recipes call for large amounts of materials which are pulled directly from your inventory.
Items crafted with the Fabricator range from specialized armor pieces to heavy firearms.

## Soundtrack
Thermal Shock has a massive OST made by yours truly. Most of it is already in the mod as BGM and music discs, but if you want MORE music, each major version comes with a little addon for the Music Triggers mod, adding even more music for certain bosses and events.


_(This mod is still in beta, there will be bugs. If you find any, or have any questions or suggestions regarding the mod and future updates, feel free to leave a comment somewhere on my YouTube; "ThermaDevYT.")_

_(Made With MCreator)_
